title: Sussy Balls
body:
Suspicious Balls?!

That's right! Your favourite item in Minecraft, suspicious stew, can now be crafted into some suspicious snowballs! Simply combine some red and brown mushrooms with a snowball and a flower of your choice to get some suspicious balls! You may also combine a suspicious snowball with even MORE suspicious flowers to create a combined effect! Throw these suspicious snowballs at your opponents to affect them suspiciously!
